# checkpointsase_enhanced_regions (Data Source)

List the cloud regions available for deploying `checkpointsase_enhanced_network` resources. Each entry provides the `id` to pass as `harmony_sase_region_id` when declaring an enhanced network's region.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "checkpointsase_enhanced_regions" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `regions` (List of Object) The list of available Check Point SASE regions for enhanced networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `continent_code` (String)
- `country_code` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
